title: Sherlog Blast-Radius Output
description: Result of a targeted blast-radius query for a single file.

target_file.description: Repo-relative path of the queried file.

found.description: Whether the file was found in the consumer graph scan.

error.description: Error message when found is false.

exports.description: Named exports detected in the target file.

direct_consumers.description: Files that directly import the target file (one hop).

transitive_consumers.description: Files that import the target file transitively (two or more hops).

test_files.description: Consumer files classified as test files — these must be updated when the target changes.

do_not_touch.description: Consumer files in do-not-touch context zones — touching target may force an exception review.

obligations.description: Human-readable obligation statements derived from the context zones of the target and its consumers.

downstream_count.description: Total number of unique downstream consumers (direct + transitive).

blast_level.description: Risk tier: none (0 consumers), low, medium, or high (>= threshold).
